title: murraya lucida
intro: Murraya lucida, also known as May Chang or Yellow Jessamine, is a small evergreen tree or shrub native to Australia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its fragrant leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Murraya lucida include reducing anxiety and stress, improving respiratory health, and acting as an insect repellent. The herbal preparations of Murraya lucida include essential oil, which is often used in aromatherapy, and tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
